law: Gold in to the house, value out from the house. No partner ever holds or receives E⤴ — offers that would break this are never listed.

offers.name: Billboard mini-run
offers.blurb: Three days of your card pushed across Our Street and Uprise Nation — the network carrying your name.

offers.name: Wire spotlight
offers.blurb: Your drop pinned at the top of the Wire for 48 hours — the first thing Our Street reads.

offers.name: Pitch-deck polish
offers.blurb: The desk tunes your auto-built deck by hand — copy, order, one sharpened story.

offers.name: Partner deals — arming
offers.blurb: Real brand discounts land here as partner-network approvals clear: gear, software, phone plans, car care. Gold buys the code; the partner never touches E⤴.
